name: Cake Mix for Easy Bake Ovens
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all dry ingredients in a bowl.
2. Cut in the shortening using your fingers or a knife until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Store the mix covered for up to 12 weeks.
To use:
1. In a separate bowl, combine 1/3 cup of the cake mix with 4 teaspoons water.
2. Pour the batter into an Easy Bake Oven-safe dish and bake according to the oven's instructions.
